content: Cognee 1.2.2 (released June 26, 2026, PyPI). Python 3.10-3.14. pip install cognee. Env vars: LLM_API_KEY=<openai_key>, LLM_PROVIDER=openai, LLM_MODEL=openai/gpt-4o-mini. Defaults (no extra deps): Kuzu for graph (file-based), LanceDB for vector (file-based), SQLite for relational. SYSTEM_ROOT_DIRECTORY=.patchpilot_memory/ sets persistence root. DATA_ROOT_DIRECTORY sets raw file storage. All three stores live under SYSTEM_ROOT_DIRECTORY/databases/. Single-machine, file-locking store — fine for single-user app, not suitable for concurrent multi-agent. For production with concurrent access use Neo4j or FalkorDB.
